name: Chrysomelidae
diagnosis: The insects of family Chrysomelidae are beetles, commonly known as leaf beetles, includes over 37,000 (and probably at least 50,000) species in more than 2,500 genera, making it one of the largest and most commonly encountered of all beetle families. Numerous subfamilies are recognized, but only some of them are listed below and the precise taxonomy and systematics are likely to change with ongoing research.

genus_notes.diabrotica: Diabrotica is a widespread genus of beetles, sometimes referred to as cucumber beetles or corn rootworms, in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.labidomera: Labidomera is a genus of leaf beetles.
genus_notes.disonycha: Disonycha is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.acalymma: Acalymma is a genus of leaf beetles found mainly in the New World.
genus_notes.leptinotarsa: Leptinotarsa is a genus of leaf beetles.
genus_notes.gibbobruchus: Gibbobruchus is a genus of pea and bean weevils in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.deloyala: Deloyala is a genus of tortoise beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.colaspis: Colaspis is a genus of beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.chelymorpha: Chelymorpha is a genus of tortoise beetles and hispines in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.charidotella: Charidotella is a genus of tortoise beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.helocassis: Helocassis is a genus of tortoise beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.sumitrosis: Sumitrosis is a genus of leaf beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.cassida: Cassida is a large Old World genus of tortoise beetles in the subfamily Cassidinae.
genus_notes.kuschelina: Kuschelina is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.dibolia: Dibolia is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.crioceris: Crioceris or asparagus beetle is a genus of the family Chrysomelidae of beetles.
genus_notes.lema: Lema is a genus of beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.amblycerus: Amblycerus is a genus of pea and bean weevils in the family of beetles known as Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.neolema: Neolema is a genus of leaf beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.calligrapha: Calligrapha is a genus of large American Chrysomelinae (a subfamily of leaf beetles) of imprecise taxonomic boundaries.
genus_notes.chrysomela: Chrysomela is a genus of leaf beetles found almost throughout the world, but missing from Australia.
genus_notes.plagiodera: Plagiodera is a genus of Chrysomelinae (a subfamily of leaf beetles).
genus_notes.altica: Altica (New Latin from Greek ἁλτικός, haltikós, "jumper" or "jumping") is a large genus of flea beetles in the subfamily Galerucinae, with about 300 species, distributed nearly worldwide.
genus_notes.systena: Systena is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.ophraella: Ophraella is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.phyllotreta: Phyllotreta is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.anomoea: Anomoea is a genus of leaf beetles in the subfamily Cryptocephalinae.
genus_notes.pyrrhalta: Pyrrhalta is a genus of beetles in the leaf beetle family, Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.epitrix: Epitrix is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.monocesta: Monocesta is a genus of skeletonizing leaf beetles and flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.blepharida: Blepharida is a genus of leaf beetles of the subfamily Galerucinae.
genus_notes.gastrophysa: Gastrophysa is a genus of beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.galerucella: Galerucella is a genus of leaf beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.chrysolina: Chrysolina is a large genus of leaf beetles in the subfamily Chrysomelinae.
genus_notes.trirhabda: Trirhabda is a genus of skeletonizing leaf beetles and flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.megacerus: Megacerus is a genus of large-horned bruchids in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.coleothorpa: Coleothorpa is a genus of case-bearing leaf beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.donacia: Donacia is a large genus of leaf beetles in the subfamily Donaciinae.
genus_notes.luperaltica: Luperaltica is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.capraita: Capraita is a genus of flea beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.oulema: Oulema is a genus of beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.crepidodera: Crepidodera is a genus of beetle from a leaf beetle family.
genus_notes.cryptocephalus: Cryptocephalus is a genus of leaf beetles in the subfamily Cryptocephalinae and belonging to the group of case-bearing leaf beetles called the Camptosomata.
genus_notes.odontota: Odontota is a genus of tortoise beetles and hispines in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.stenispa: Stenispa is a genus of tortoise beetles and hispines in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.typophorus: Typophorus is a genus of leaf beetles in the subfamily Eumolpinae.
genus_notes.lilioceris: Lilioceris is a genus of beetles in the leaf beetle family, Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.baliosus: Baliosus is a genus of tortoise beetles and hispines in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.acanthoscelides: Acanthoscelides is a genus of bean weevils of the subfamily Bruchinae.
genus_notes.prasocuris: Prasocuris is a genus of Chrysomelinae (a subfamily of leaf beetles).
genus_notes.physonota: Physonota is a genus of tortoise beetles and hispines in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.bassareus: Bassareus is a genus of case-bearing leaf beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.gratiana: Gratiana is a genus of tortoise beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.plateumaris: Plateumaris is a genus of aquatic leaf beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
genus_notes.demotina: Demotina is a genus of leaf beetles in the family Chrysomelidae.
